ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_syndromes" (
  "syndrome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic syndrome */,
  "syndrome_name" TEXT /* Name of the genetic syndrome (e.g., FAP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic syndrome */,
  "reference_link" TEXT /* Link to external resources for more information */,
  "discovery_year" INTEGER /* Year the syndrome was discovered */,
  "prevalence" TEXT /* Estimated prevalence of the syndrome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syndrome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene (e.g., APC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "mutation_types" TEXT /* Common mutation types associated with the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inheritance_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance pattern */,
  "pattern_name" TEXT /* Name of the inheritance pattern (e.g., Autosomal dominant) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inheritance pattern */,
  "genetic_basis" TEXT /* Genetic basis of the inheritance pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancer_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancer risk */,
  "syndrome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic syndrome associated with the cancer risk */,
  "cancer_type" TEXT /* Type of cancer (e.g., Colorectum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cancer risk */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "age_of_onset" TEXT /* Typical age range for onset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancer_risks_syndrome_id FOREIGN KEY ("syndrome_id") REFERENCES genetic_syndromes ("syndrome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveillance_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveillance method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the surveillance method (e.g., Flexible sigmoidoscopy or colonoscopy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the surveillance method */,
  "procedure_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the procedure */,
  "required_equipment" TEXT /* Equipment needed for the procedure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveillance_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveillance plan */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer risk associated with the plan */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveillance method */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for the surveillance (e.g., Starting at age 10–15; annually) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the surveillance (e.g., biennial, quarterly) */,
  "clinician_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes from the clinician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_plans_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_id") REFERENCES cancer_risks ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_plans_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES surveillance_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "syndrome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic syndrome associated with the patient */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene associated with the patient */,
  "inheritance_pattern_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inheritance pattern associated with the patient */,
  "cancer_risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cancer risk associated with the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Patient's ethnicity */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Relevant family medical history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_inheritance_pattern_id FOREIGN KEY ("inheritance_pattern_id") REFERENCES inheritance_patterns ("pattern_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_cancer_risk_id FOREIGN KEY ("cancer_risk_id") REFERENCES cancer_risks ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_syndrome_id FOREIGN KEY ("syndrome_id") REFERENCES genetic_syndromes ("syndrome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveillance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveillance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient associated with the record */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveillance plan */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the surveillance */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the surveillance (e.g., Normal, Abnormal) */,
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinician who performed the surveillance */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_records_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES surveillance_plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_records_clinician_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinician_id") REFERENCES clinicians ("clinician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinicians" (
  "clinician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clinician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the clinician */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the clinician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinician_id")
)
